title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Snapdeal - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Snapdeal - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Snapdeal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Snapdeal:
Snapdeal is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
